name: Candy Cane Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Combine the first three ingredients and press into a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Blend the sour cream, sugar, eggs, flour, and both extracts until smooth.
4. Add the cream cheese and butter. Stir in the crushed candy.
5. Pour into crust and bake on the lowest rack of oven for 50-60 minutes or until firm.
6. Allow to cool (top may crack) and refrigerate overnight.
7. Remove from pan and serve.
8. Top with sweetened whipped cream and garnish with peppermint candy if desired.
